text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Kashiwa Kinen, there's no sign
of Hokko Tarumae, the winner of the previous
year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she hasn't yet recovered from her
stomach bug. Even so, Copano Rickey is
determined to show her skills against Wonder
Acute.
